'''Olim''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] at the center of the [[Perave system]]. From the surface of [[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]], Olim appeared [[Color/Legends#White|white]].<ref name="KOTORCG" />

{{Star-stub}}
